description_long: This object is a tall, slender candle with a rectangular cross-section and a smooth, uniform surface. The candle is a pale gray color, with a slightly lighter, semi-translucent flame at the top, indicating it is lit. The flame is small and teardrop-shaped, sitting atop a short, visible wick. The candle does not appear to have any decorative elements, wax drips, or embellishments, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. There is no visible holder or base, suggesting it is designed to stand upright on its own. Its proportions and style make it suitable for use in urban environments such as public parks, outdoor cafes, or as part of street decorations.
description: A tall, rectangular, pale gray candle with a small, lit flame and a minimalist, smooth surface. No holder or wax drips are visible.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height and rectangular face of the candle with the flame centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the candle's narrow profile and the flame slightly angled to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the flame visible at the top and the same rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the narrow profile with the flame angled to the right.
